runtime_policy: repo-only fixture tests; launches only Python child processes for gate CLI coverage; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, or visible windows
guard_policy: proves the battle UI gate is fail-closed across runtime evidence, patch-stage, candidate-location, and stable-regression boundaries before any battle patch group exists
tests: battle_ui_gate passes only when centered battle evidence, command hit, grid hit, modal classification, clean patch stage, and stable smoke proof are present
battle_ui_gate fails closed for missing battle reachability, command hit, grid hit, modal classification, visual classification, and AV rows
battle_ui_gate fails closed for candidates outside C:\ClashTests, wrong stages, base-SHA drift, original/unexpected bytes, and failing stable-smoke evidence
battle_ui_gate CLI writes JSON/Markdown and returns 2 on --require-pass failure
